---
name: 'speckit.specify'
agent: speckit.specify
model: GPT-5.4
---

# Specify Prompt

Purpose

Create a clear project specification (what and why) based on .\prd\prd.md and the Constitution produced earlier.

Instructions for Copilot

1. Read .\prd\prd.md and the Constitution (if present).
2. Produce:
   - Problem statement
   - Target users and use cases
   - Expected outcomes and success criteria
   - Scope (in/out)
3. Do not include technical implementation details (stack, architecture).

Inputs

- File: .\prd\prd.md
